title: Helios Renewable Energy Project: decision on an application for development consent under the Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by Enso Green Holdings D Limited for the construction, operation (including maintenance), and decommissioning of ground-mounted solar photovoltaic arrays with a total capacity of 190 megawatts (MW).  Date of decision  3 December 2025  Company / location   Enso Green Holdings D LimitedSouth of Selby, North Yorkshire   Type of project  Development consent order for a photovoltaic solar farm under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  190 MW  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
